data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the exit triggers: booking made, purchase completed, link clicked. While there is evidence of a booking being made (evidence from 'customer-book-primary'), there is no evidence of a purchase being completed or a link being clicked. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as not all exit triggers are confirmed to be satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of a purchase being completed.
No evidence of a link being clicked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for purchase completion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a purchase completion event is recorded.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for link click tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that link click events are being tracked.
